---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new compiler feature, backend, or industry vertical
labels: enhancement
---

## What feature?

(One sentence summary.)

## Why?

(What problem does this solve. Who is the user. What is the
current workaround.)

## Where does it fit?

- [ ] Language spec change (`lang/spec/`)
- [ ] Compiler internals (`lang/parser/`, `lang/profiler/`, `lang/optimizer/`)
- [ ] Software backend (`software/backends/`)
- [ ] Hardware backend (`hardware/`)
- [ ] Industry vertical (`industries/<vertical>/`)
- [ ] Tooling (`tools/`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Roadmap entry

Does this align with a phase in `roadmap/phases/`? If yes, which.
If no, propose where it should go in the roadmap.

## Patent considerations

Does this implementation touch a patented method? (See
`patents/index.md`.)
